title: T cell differentiation from mice spleen tissue

steps: Prepare precoated 96-well plate using antibodies described in materials section.
Prepare single-cell suspensions of mice spleen tissues as per steps below
Euthanize mice by CO 2 inhalation or other means of euthanasia.
Collect the spleen from the mice.
Add 5mL of RPMI medium to the mashed spleen to collect splenocytes into a 50mL tube.
Put a 40╬╝m vacuum filter on a 50mL tube. Mesh the spleen on the strainer using the back of a syringe.
Spin down cells at 1500rpm for 3min. Discard supernatant.
Directly add 5mL T cell medium.
Add 0.5mL ACK lysis buffer to the red cell pellet, resuspend, and wait 30 seconds to lyse RBC.
Spin down cells at 1500rpm for 3min. Discard supernatant.
Count the cells.
Resuspend cells in 10mL T cell medium and filter through a new 40╬╝m vacuum filter.
Prepare a new 50mL tube with a new 40╬╝m vacuum filter.

Na├»ve CD4 + T cells were isolated from single-cell suspensions from spleen tissue by negative selection using the EasySep Mouse CD4 + T-cell Isolation Kit (#19852, STEMCELL Technologies, Vancouver, Canada).
Seed the cells into plate and culture with different conditions
Take out the pre-coated plate from 4Ōäā.
Regulate the cell concentration at 5├Ś10 5 /mL with T cell medium %s %s
Incubate for 5 days at 37┬░C.
Seed 100╬╝L differentiation cocktail.
Seed wells of a 96-well plate with 150╬╝L cells cocktail (100╬╝L cells and 50╬╝L T cell media.
Remove the supernatant and add 200╬╝L PBS to the pre-coated plate and then remove PBS to wash the coated plate. Repeat 2 times.
Collect cells and count.
Collect supernatant for ELISA. (Note: The supernatant can be frozen at -20┬░C.)
Add 100╬╝L PMA cocktail and culture overnight. For non-stimulate cells, add 100╬╝L T cell medium. %s %s
Seed 100╬╝L cells into a new 96-well plate (U bottle)
Regulate cell concentration at 1├Ś10 6 /mL.
Spin down cells at 1500rpm for 3min at RT.
Surface staining, add 50╬╝L FACS Buffer mAbs cocktail: %s %s
Add 150╬╝L FACS buffer and spin down cells at 1500rpm for 3min at RT. Remove the supernatant.
Remove the supernatant over the sink in one motion.
Add 50uL 1├ŚPermeabilization Buffer mAb cocktail (Foxp3): %s %s
Add 200┬ĄL 1├ŚPermeabilization Buffer (make fresh) to each well and centrifuge samples at 400-600g for 5min at RT. Discard the supernatant.
Centrifuge samples at 400-600g for 5min at RT.

Add 200┬ĄL of Foxp3 Fixation/Permeabilization working solution to each well for 1 hour at RT in the dark. (4├Śstock solution must be diluted prior to use with the Fixation/Permeabilization Diluent dilute 1 part concentrate with 3 parts diluents, make fresh).
Incubate at 4┬░C for 30min in the dark.
Remove the staining buffer and thoroughly resuspend cells.
Directly add 150uL FACS buffer and spin down cells at 1500rpm for 3min at RT.
Add 200╬╝L 1├ŚPermeabilization Buffer for Flow Cytometry.
Directly add 200┬ĄL 1├ŚPermeabilization Buffer to each well and centrifuge samples at 400-600g for 5min at RT. Discard the supernatant.
Incubate at 4┬░C for 30min in the dark.
